TABLE.NAME: local_student_core
TABLE.COMMENT: Default comment for local_student_core, please edit me

TABLE.NAME: student_course_payments
TABLE.COMMENT: Here is the information about the course payments

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course ID related to the payment

FIELD.NAME: payment_status_id
FIELD.COMMENT: ID related to the payment status

FIELD.NAME: payment_status_str
FIELD.COMMENT: String related to the payment status (Approve, pending, decline, etc..)

FIELD.NAME: unique_ref
FIELD.COMMENT: This must be a unique ref string like 'coursename-timestamp'

FIELD.NAME: caregiver_id
FIELD.COMMENT: Related to the custom field of user that is the caregiver
